user.title: Alstom P14x Protection Relay
user.description: Configure connection to your P14x series protection relay via Modbus TCP.

data_description.host: IP address of the Modbus TCP gateway or RTU-to-TCP converter
data_description.slave_id: Modbus unit address of the relay (1-247)
data_description.password: Relay password for write access (CB control). Leave blank if not required.
data_description.scan_interval_fast: Polling rate for CB status, alarms, and digital I/O (default: 1s)
data_description.scan_interval_medium: Polling rate for currents, voltages, power (default: 15s)
data_description.scan_interval_slow: Polling rate for energy counters and fault records (default: 60s)
data_description.enable_cb_control: Enable remote trip and close buttons (requires CB status enabled)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Modbus TCP host
error.cannot_communicate: Connected but unable to communicate with the relay. Check slave ID.
error.cb_control_requires_status: CB control requires CB status monitoring to be enabled
